name: borrower-name-broker-correction-spelling
rationale: loan_application doc shows borrower_name 'Marcus Web' (typo missing second 'b'). Broker correction asserts 'Marcus Webb' (correct spelling). F1.BN canonical-map resolves to broker_correction tier. Tests broker authority over doc-source spelling errors for borrower-name field.
notes: Two-event sequence. Spelling-error correction — common real-world pattern.
